'''kadogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huarizo|huarizo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-d-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huarizo|huarizo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kadogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kædegeth|kædegeth]] || [[word:kædegej|kædegej]] || [[word:kædegesh|kædegesh]] || [[word:kædege|kædege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kadodogoth|kadodogoth]] || [[word:kadodogoj|kadodogoj]] || [[word:kadodogosh|kadodogosh]] || [[word:kadodogo|kadodogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kadogoth|kadogoth]] || [[word:kadogoj|kadogoj]] || [[word:kadogosh|kadogosh]] || [[word:kadogo|kadogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kadofgoth|kadofgoth]] || [[word:kadofgoj|kadofgoj]] || [[word:kadofgosh|kadofgosh]] || [[word:kadofgof|kadofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kadogotho|kadogotho]] || [[word:kadogojo|kadogojo]] || [[word:kadogosho|kadogosho]] || [[word:kadogoko|kadogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kadogoth|kadogoth]] || [[word:kadogoj|kadogoj]] || [[word:kadogosh|kadogosh]] || [[word:kadogo|kadogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kadogothol|kadogothol]] || [[word:kadogojol|kadogojol]] || [[word:kadogoshol|kadogoshol]] || [[word:kadogokol|kadogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kadogothotho|kadogothotho]] || [[word:kadogojojo|kadogojojo]] || [[word:kadogoshosho|kadogoshosho]] || [[word:kadogoko|kadogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kadogothon|kadogothon]] || [[word:kadogojon|kadogojon]] || [[word:kadogoshon|kadogoshon]] || [[word:kadogokon|kadogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kadogothoro|kadogothoro]] || [[word:kadogojoro|kadogojoro]] || [[word:kadogoshoro|kadogoshoro]] || [[word:kadogokoro|kadogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
